---
title:  
    "Parallel evolution"
date: 
    "May 26th, 2025"
author:  
    "Ali Movasati"  
output:  
    html_document:
        #css: style.css
        toc: true
        toc_depth: 2
        toc_float: true
        number_sections: true
        theme: lumen
        highlight: zenburn
        code_folding: hide
        code_download: true # to make the Rmd source code available
---




```{r loading libraries, echo=FALSE}

# loading libraries
library("ggplot2")
library("ggpubr")
library("plotly")
library("reshape2")
library("ggvenn")
library("hrbrthemes")
library("DT")
library("dplyr")
library("tidyr")
library("Biostrings")
library("stringr")
library("magrittr")
library("rstatix")
library("effsize")
library("coda")


```


```{r read-in variant data}

# determine the server path
if (file.exists("/home/amovas/")){
  print("Remote HPC Connection!")
  wd <- "/home/amovas/data/genome-evo-proj/"
} else {
  print("Local PC Connection!")
  wd <- "/Users/alimos313/Documents/studies/phd/hpc-research/genome-evo-proj/"
}

# load data
source(paste0(wd, "src/analysis/1st-man/readin_data.R"))

```

```{r load visualization settings}

# Visual settings
source(paste0(wd, "src/analysis/1st-man/plot_custom.R"))


```


```{r category thresholds}

# set parameters
category <- "Minority"

if (category == "Minority"){
    min_threshold <- 0.01
    max_threshold <- 0.5
} else if (category == "Majority"){
    min_threshold <- 0.5
    max_threshold <- 1.01
} else if (category == "Fixed"){
    min_threshold <- 0.99
    max_threshold <- 1.01
}
```

```{r environment randomization}

end_fixed <- 
        variants_expiii %>%
        filter(allele_freq >= min_threshold, allele_freq < max_threshold, passage == end_psg) %>%
        select(c(exp_line,mut_info)) %>%
        distinct()

# create a named vector from the df
muts <- end_fixed$mut_info
names(muts) <- end_fixed$exp_line

# convert named vector to list
muts_list <- lapply(split(muts, names(muts)), unname)


# Store results
num_simulations <- 10000  # Number of simulations
results <- data.frame(Shared_MT2 = numeric(num_simulations),
                      Shared_MT4 = numeric(num_simulations),
                      Shared_Both = numeric(num_simulations),
                      Unique_MT2 = numeric(num_simulations),
                      Unique_MT4 = numeric(num_simulations))

set.seed(123)  # For reproducibility
# Run the process 1000 times
for (i in 1:num_simulations) {

    # Shuffle names
    muts_vec <- unname(unlist(muts_list))
    names(muts_vec) <- sample(rep(names(muts_list), lengths(muts_list)))

    # Convert back to list
    muts_list_new <- split(muts_vec, names(muts_vec))

    # Calculate mutation categories
    shared_mt2 <- intersect(muts_list_new[[1]], muts_list_new[[2]])
    shared_mt4 <- intersect(muts_list_new[[3]], muts_list_new[[4]])
    shared_both <- intersect(c(muts_list_new[[1]], muts_list_new[[2]]), 
                            c(muts_list_new[[3]], muts_list_new[[4]]))
    unique_mt2 <- setdiff(setdiff(c(muts_list_new[[1]], muts_list_new[[2]]), 
                                c(muts_list_new[[3]], muts_list_new[[4]])), 
                        shared_mt2)
    unique_mt4 <- setdiff(setdiff(c(muts_list_new[[3]], muts_list_new[[4]]), 
                                c(muts_list_new[[1]], muts_list_new[[2]])), 
                        shared_mt4)

    # Store results
    results[i, ] <- c(length(shared_mt2), length(shared_mt4), length(shared_both), 
                        length(unique_mt2), length(unique_mt4))
}

# get hpd values
hpd_results <- apply(results, 2, function(x) HPDinterval(as.mcmc(x), prob = 0.95))

# extract lower and upper bounds for the HPD intervals
hpd_lower <- as.integer(hpd_results[1,]) # Lower bounds
hpd_upper <- as.integer(hpd_results[2,]) # Upper bounds


```

```{r prepare data}


# Step 1: Compute Original Mutation Counts
original_shared_mt2 <- intersect(muts_list[[1]], muts_list[[2]])
original_shared_mt4 <- intersect(muts_list[[3]], muts_list[[4]])
original_shared_both <- intersect(c(muts_list[[1]], muts_list[[2]]), 
                                c(muts_list[[3]], muts_list[[4]]))
original_unique_mt2 <- setdiff(setdiff(c(muts_list[[1]], muts_list[[2]]), 
                                    c(muts_list[[3]], muts_list[[4]])), 
                            original_shared_mt2)
original_unique_mt4 <- setdiff(setdiff(c(muts_list[[3]], muts_list[[4]]), 
                                    c(muts_list[[1]], muts_list[[2]])), 
                            original_shared_mt4)

original_counts <- c(length(original_shared_mt2), length(original_shared_mt4), 
                    length(original_shared_both), length(original_unique_mt2), 
                    length(original_unique_mt4))


# Step 2: Prepare Data for Plotting
comparison_df <- data.frame(
    Category = factor(
        c("Shared in MT-2", "Shared in MT-4", "Shared in both"),
        levels = c("Shared in MT-2", "Shared in MT-4", "Shared in both")),
    Type = rep(c("Original", "Simulated"), each = 3),  # Labels for grouping
    Count = c(original_counts[1:3], colMeans(results[1:3])),  # Combine original and simulated means
    SE = c(rep(NA, 3), apply(results[1:3], 2, function(x) sd(x) / sqrt(length(x)))),  # Standard Error for Simulated
    HPD_Lower = c(rep(NA, 3), hpd_lower[1:3]),  # HPD Lower only for Simulated
    HPD_Upper = c(rep(NA, 3), hpd_upper[1:3])   # HPD Upper only for Simulated
)


# step 3: Significance test

# not normally distributed, so use wilcoxon test
plot(density(results$Shared_MT2), col = "red", lwd = 2, main = "Density Plot of Shared Mutations in MT-2")
shapiro.test(results$Shared_MT2)

# Perform significance test for each category

empirical_p <- function(simulated, observed) {
  mean(abs(simulated - mean(simulated)) >= abs(observed - mean(simulated)))
}

empirical_p_values <- sapply(1:ncol(results[1:3]), function(i) {
  empirical_p(results[[i]], original_counts[i])
})


# Adjust if needed
adjusted_empirical_p <- p.adjust(empirical_p_values, method = "bonferroni")


# Determine significance levels
significance_labels <- sapply(adjusted_empirical_p, function(p) {
  if (p < 0.001) {
    "***"
  } else if (p < 0.01) {
    "**"
  } else if (p < 0.05) {
    "*"
  } else {
    "n.s."
  }
})

# Add these labels to the data frame for plotting
comparison_df$Significance <- c(significance_labels, rep(NA, 3))  # Only add for observed counts


```

```{r visualization #1}

# Step 4: Plot with HPD Interval
dodge <- position_dodge(width=0.5)

fig <- ggplot(comparison_df, aes(x = Category, y = Count, fill = Type, group = Type)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = dodge, width = 0.5) +  # Increased dodge width
    geom_errorbar( 
        aes(ymin = HPD_Lower, ymax = HPD_Upper), # Count - SE, ymax = Count + SE
        width = 0.2,  # Narrower error bars
        position = dodge,  # Match the dodge width exactly
        size = 1) + 
    geom_text(
        data = subset(comparison_df, Type == "Original"),  # Only for observed counts
        aes(label = Significance, y = c(25,20,40)),  # Position asterisks above the bars
        position = dodge,
        size = 6
    ) +
    labs(title = "Comparison of Observed vs Randomized \n Fixed Variant Sharedness per Environment",
        x = "\nSharedness group",
        y = paste0(category," variant count\n"),
        fill = "Dataset") +
    scale_fill_manual(labels = c("Observed", "Randomized"), values = c("#038331", "#ffdf50")) +
    custom_plot_theme(application = "publication")


# save figure
custom_plot_save(fig, "environment_randomized_parallel.pdf", height = 14, width = 14)

```
